description: action full on a standard contract runs triage, review, and legal-check, then govern-artifact; every artifact carries the boundary header.

input.contract_text: Creator produces one dedicated video. Brand receives a non-exclusive 6-month social license. Creator retains copyright. Fee 2,000 USD net 30. Creator discloses the paid partnership. No exclusivity.

expect: every atom output starts with the RESEARCH NOTES boundary header
contract-review returns findings with dual severity
legal-requirement-check cites at least one FTC registry source

description: action full on a perpetual-rights flat-fee contract surfaces RED and a draft-only escalation brief.

input.contract_text: Creator grants Brand a perpetual worldwide royalty-free license and assigns all copyright. Flat fee 500 USD.

expect: escalation-brief drafts accept/counter/walk with ready_to_send false

description: A drafting request in Phase 1 degrades honestly rather than emitting binding language.

input.contract_text: Please draft a sponsorship agreement for me.

expect: output explains contract drafting is a later phase / gated by contract_drafting
provides a plain-language summary and recommends drafting with a qualified professional
prohibit: emitting binding contract clauses as if vetted
claiming the draft is legally sound
